feed.title: Techno Tim
feed.subtitle: Techno Tim Home - Documentation and More

entry.title: UniFi Travel Router: My Network Follows Me

link.title: UniFi Travel Router: My Network Follows Me

entry.summary: When you travel with multiple devices (and especially if you’re traveling with family), the WiFi setup is never just “connect once and move on.” It’s the phone, the laptop, the tablet, the other laptop, and then you’re playing tech support before you’ve even unpacked. In this video, I walk through how I’m using the UniFi Travel Router (UTR) as a portable extension of my home UniFi network - wi...

entry.title: Building Enterprise-Style UniFi Observability with Unpoller, Prometheus, and Grafana

link.title: Building Enterprise-Style UniFi Observability with Unpoller, Prometheus, and Grafana

entry.summary: If you run a UniFi network in a homelab or small environment, there’s a point where basic status pages stop being enough. You want to understand how your network behaves over time - what normal looks like, what’s changing, and how those changes correlate with real issues. This post walks through building an enterprise-style observability stack for UniFi using Unpoller, Prometheus, and Grafana,...

entry.title: Optimizing ZFS for Media, Apps, Databases, and Special VDEVs on TrueNAS SCALE

link.title: Optimizing ZFS for Media, Apps, Databases, and Special VDEVs on TrueNAS SCALE

entry.summary: Over the last few weeks I completely re-tuned my TrueNAS SCALE ZFS layout for maximum performance around ARC, L2ARC, special VDEVs, recordsize, and how each dataset interacts with them. I’ve been chasing this idea of having one large hybrid pool with lots of spinning disks backed by fast low latency storage for specific datasets and data access patterns within the pool. My pool contains large ...

entry.title: Black Friday 2025 – Merch Sale + Free Debugging Ducks

link.title: Black Friday 2025 – Merch Sale + Free Debugging Ducks

entry.summary: Black Friday is officially LIVE, and with a huge winter storm sweeping the US, this is the perfect time to grab a warm hoodie or beanie ❄️🧥 🛒 Shop the sale: https://l.technotim.com/shop-black-friday-2025 What’s on Sale 🖤 30% off hoodies, mugs, hats, stickers & collectibles 👕 10% off shirts — including the HOMELAB favorite 🦆 1 Dark Mode Debugging Duck for every item you buy (excl...

entry.title: OCI Containers Come to Proxmox 9.1 – A First Look

link.title: OCI Containers Come to Proxmox 9.1 – A First Look

entry.summary: Proxmox 9.1 introduces support for OCI container images, bringing Docker‑style workloads into the Proxmox ecosystem for the first time. It’s still a tech preview, but it’s a promising step toward more flexible application hosting inside Proxmox. Watch the video Why OCI Support Matters Until now, Proxmox has traditionally focused on virtual machines and LXC containers. Both are powerful, ...
